positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for pos.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for pos.tptp
1. netflix_show(stranger_things) [input(axiom)]
2. popular(stranger_things) [input(axiom)]
5. ! [X0] : ((netflix_show(X0) & popular(X0)) => binge_watch(karen,X0)) [input(axiom)]
7. ! [X0] : (binge_watch(karen,X0) => share(karen,lisa,X0)) [input(axiom)]
9. share(karen,lisa,stranger_things) [input(conjecture)]
10. ~share(karen,lisa,stranger_things) [negated conjecture 9]
11. ~share(karen,lisa,stranger_things) [flattening 10]
12. ! [X0] : (binge_watch(karen,X0) | (~netflix_show(X0) | ~popular(X0))) [ennf transformation 5]
13. ! [X0] : (binge_watch(karen,X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) | ~popular(X0)) [flattening 12]
14. ! [X0] : (share(karen,lisa,X0) | ~binge_watch(karen,X0)) [ennf transformation 7]
16. netflix_show(stranger_things) [cnf transformation 1]
17. popular(stranger_things) [cnf transformation 2]
20. binge_watch(karen,X0) | ~netflix_show(X0) | ~popular(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
23. share(karen,lisa,X0) | ~binge_watch(karen,X0) [cnf transformation 14]
25. ~share(karen,lisa,stranger_things) [cnf transformation 11]
27. ~binge_watch(karen,stranger_things) [resolution 23,25]
28. ~netflix_show(stranger_things) | ~popular(stranger_things) [resolution 27,20]
29. ~popular(stranger_things) [forward subsumption resolution 28,16]
30. $false [forward subsumption resolution 29,17]
% SZS output end Proof for pos.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
